IN ADDITION, THIS APPEARS TO BE A HOUSING MATTER AND ALL FUTURE FILINGS IN THIS CASE SHOULD BE DIRECTED TO DEPARTMENT 501. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Plaintiff EURDELL J. JACKSON-CURRY, Tel No. 510-776-1871 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Plaintiff did not notify the Court or opposing party of her intent to appear to argue the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT JUSTIN DUGUAY'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint, the motion is granted. Plaintiff fails to demonstrate proper service of the defendant. In addition, this appears to be a housing matter and all future filings in this case should be directed to department 501. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
